reviews.review_description: The developers are nice and play with you and it is unique
This game is fun it’s like among us but different and way cooler in my opinion
this game was so much fun playing with the developers and other friends + I even got a chance to record 2 games and it was one heck of a ride thanks again for inviting me to this game :]

Definitely still a new game but it's super fun! And if there is ever an issue with the game you can reach out on their discord and it's usually resolved very quickly! They are always improving it and I'm surprised more people aren't playing it yet but I'm sure they will!
So far it's been fun

This game is like Among Us, but with werewolves. This Vr game has so much potential to grow more & more. It gets you on your toes while playing. It’s also fun meeting new friends in the lobby & playing mini games.

Star Wars review title aside, when I first heard of NOT ME I was skeptical but after trying it out my opinions immediately changed! The game is really fun and has minimal bugs. There’s a lot to do even when you aren’t in a match. The game starts you off well when it comes to teaching you what to do without removing all the fun of learning things for yourself! It’s very similar to among us but it adds some things that make it more interesting like how the werewolf has to collect hearts to to transform. And the games sabotage system of burning the materials was quite clever. I can’t wait to see where this game goes in the future. Keep up the great work devs!

This game is awesome and I recommend u try this game put with your friends and I guaranteed u will love this game i played with a girl name clover and she showed me how to play and get the hang of the game 10/10

Folks if you like that dead by daylight sorta game like myself this is a no brainer nuff said lol MORE PEOPLE NEED TO KNOW ABOUT THIS. OUTSTANDING JOB DEVS. IF YALL WANT THIS HIT MY l i n k t r . e e slash mr12gage330 and check out others too just leave no spaces
So I found this game through some friends and I played it for the first time was very fun and the owners are amazing 9/10 would play again
This is a amazing game! I personally think that this will be the next big game that can be on the featured spot in the store! I love the game and hope you keep up the amazing work!

Me and my friends love to play not me! You are running around completing tasks, or being a werewolf, secretly sabotaging your group, and killing them off one by one… The aim of the game is to make sure that you don’t get caught if you’re the werewolf, or to catch the werewolf before it kills you or ruins all of your hard work. All of the different tasks are so fun and dynamic, whether it’s collecting meat, chopping wood, soldering metal, or piercing fish… The versatility and excitement is always there! Even just the carnival island where you load into is so fun and has so many mini games and different activities you can try out! Honestly, sometimes I just play the carnival island and play the mini games and roam around going on the merry-go-round and the ferris wheel LOL, the jetpack is so fun too! I think this game is awesome and can’t wait to see it on the oculus store when it does eventually go into full release, which I’m sure it will! Guaranteed fun for you and your friends, and even if you’re just playing solo, you can still play with the AI’s, which is great fun too! ￼

Haven't gotten to try multiplayer yet, no players, but this is a new game! I will say, it feels odd being unable to move diagonally, but maybe that's just me. Anyway, can't wait for people to start getting this game!
Great game to play with friends. I recommend this to everyone 😊😊

For what it is, the game is great! ordinarily this game would be a 3/5 for having clunky gripping mechanics, an odd smooth locomotion system, and overall feeling like a game that was meant for PC that was quickly ported to VR, with things like characters having full-body run animations and always turning to face they way you are walking, regardless of which way you are actually facing, this game gets full marks for having a friendly and responsive dev team who are fully commited to improving the game!
This game is so so fun. Not only is the game portion of it great but there's also a lobby where you can play carnival games. I always have a great time when I play it. I highly recommend it!
The game is very good and makes a Lot of fun. Its just like among us but with Extras.

I played Among Us before, but this is more interesting to me. The location of the gameplay is interactive, even the area everyone loads into is fun. It’s like a carnival with ring toss and darts, a carousel and Ferris wheel. Then the actual gameplay is good…being survivors of a plane crash or the wolves who eat them. The survivors have a way to escape if they don’t get eaten before they finish their tasks. It’s really cool. 👍🏾👍🏾
Really cool game , definitely a game to play with friends , I'd say it's better than alot of murder mystery games

reviews.review_title: It’s fun but with minor drawbacks
reviews.review_description: Not me is a 6 vs 2 social deduction game where you have to lie to other players and friends. The only drawbacks are that the map is quite small and it’s easy to find werewolves because they are maybe five steps away from you. The other drawback is that the rounds feel short maybe 6-7 minutes because of the round time before voting if they extended the amount of rounds it might make for some interesting arguments and conclusions. That’s not the end though the werewolves only need two hearts to transform into werewolves if they maybe extend it to 3 it would seem fair because this also goes with having more rounds because if we had more rounds it would give the werewolves a easier time winning.
